name: McMenamins Grand Lodge
heroSub: A private film screening & plated dinner in one room at McMenamins Grand Lodge.
aboutHeadline:
This is not a seminar.
It's a private premiere.
about: You've been personally invited to an exclusive screening of Retirement Everest.
The evening unfolds in the Alice Meek Inkley Room — film first, then plated dinner in the same space.

expect.title: Arrive & Be Welcomed
expect.desc: Doors open 15 minutes before showtime in the Alice Meek Inkley Room.

expect.title: Watch the Film
expect.desc: Retirement Everest screens with theater seating in the Inkley Room.

expect.title: A Plated Dinner
expect.desc: After the film, salad, entrée, and dessert served at your table in the same room.

formTitle: Reserve Your Seat at the Table
formIntro: Dinner is included — select your salad, entrée, and dessert below.
footer: Retirement Everest · Private Screening Series · McMenamins Grand Lodge · Forest Grove, OR

salads.name: Brewer's Salad
salads.desc: Blue cheese crumbles, marinated red onion, hazelnuts, Ruby-raspberry vinaigrette

entrees.name: Lemon & Herb-Roasted Chicken Breast
entrees.desc: Yukon Gold mashed potatoes, wild rice pilaf & vegetables

entrees.name: Poached Salmon
entrees.desc: Pinot gris-shallot beurre blanc, wild rice pilaf & garlic green beans

desserts.name: Ruby's Raspberry Cheesecake
desserts.desc: Vanilla cheesecake, raspberry swirl, graham cracker crust

costSim.note: From Grand Lodge banquet packages (June 2026). Confirm F&B minimum with sales.
